title: deutzia × carnea
intro: Deutzia × carnea, also known as the Rose Collection, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Hydrangeaceae family and is a cross between Deutzia scabra and Deutzia crenata. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Deutzia × carnea are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
